author: lOrm
content: Fixed: load-modify-save TOCTOU eliminated via flock(2) LOCK_EX on schedules.json.lock (libc::flock, matching claude_credentials.rs pattern). Writes atomic via tempfile+rename(2). All 3 call sites hold the lock; lock released on Drop. Forensic tests added: cron_create_concurrent_writes_do_not_corrupt_store (8 threads, lost-update race detector), schedule_lock_blocks_then_releases_on_drop (exclusive + Drop release with mpsc timing), schedule_lock_acquire_surfaces_open_failure (errors surface, no silent degradation), schedule_save_locked_is_atomic_via_rename (no tempfile after save). All pass. Cargo clippy --lib --tests -D warnings exits 0 (#403 changes in isolation). No #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore].
